acceptance_criteria.evidence: RouteThreatDigest now carries a tactical assessment with state, confidence, headline, reasons, windowOpen, and route-relative zone risks.
Live ESP formatting continues to expose tactical state/window context while using the richer digest data.
Pre-flight briefing now emits a concise `Тактика:` line.
Targeted tests and full npm run check passed.

commands: npm run test -- tests/unit/eve-board-analytics.test.ts tests/unit/eve-board-advisor.test.ts tests/unit/briefing.test.ts tests/unit/eve-board-monitor.test.ts
